use_codes.desc: METHOD OF ADMINISTERING VALBENAZINE WHILE AVOIDING CONCOMITANT USE OF A STRONG CYP3A4 INDUCER
A METHOD OF TREATING HUNTINGTON'S CHOREA
METHOD OF TREATING TARDIVE DYSKINESIA WHILE AVOIDING CONCOMITANT USE OF A STRONG CYP3A4 INDUCER

indications.text:
INGREZZA and INGREZZA SPRINKLE are indicated for the treatment of adults with:
- tardive dyskinesia [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
- chorea associated with Huntington’s disease [see Clinical Studies (14.2)].
